# campanile

This is a port of the [`ucbthesis`](https://ctan.org/pkg/ucbthesis) LaTeX package to typst.

A few differences from the original:
- No dedicated copyright page (note that submitting the thesis as EECS tech report will add one for you)
- Signature page for Plan II Masters Thesis in EECS included in `signature.typ`
- Abstract and acknowledgements pages are simplified
- Appendix with alphabetical numbering (Appendix A, Appendix B, ...)
